summary: The closure policy is owned by run-session and injected adapters; it neither imports nor calls the CLI. Existing connector and independent-review owners are reused, and the autonomous action DAG cannot create or merge a PR, waive gates, deploy, or publish.
judgment_delta: Initial concern that the policy could centralize CLI, connector, review, and PR effects was resolved because src/one-command-pr-ready-closure.js imports only node:timers and accepts bounded callbacks. Conformance is 80 versus origin/main 81 with no new CLI reverse edge.
